transcript: Speaker A: कल कहां गए थे? [Where did you go yesterday?] Speaker B: I went to माल yesterday. Speaker A: माल? Pronunciation थोड़ा गड़बड़ हो गया। It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. कल क्या खाया? [Mall? Pronunciation was a bit off. It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. What did you eat yesterday?] Speaker B: I eat पीजा खाया। [I eat pizza ate.] Speaker A: पीजा? नहीं, Pizza. और बात कल की है इसलिए eat नहीं, ate. I ate pizza. ट्रेन कहां से पकड़ते हो? [Pizza? No, Pizza. And since it's about yesterday, not eat, ate. I ate pizza. Where do you catch the train from?] Speaker B: I pick train from railway इस्टेशन। [I pick train from railway station.] Speaker A: Pick? Pick मतलब उठाना। Train उठाओगे? Catch मतलब पकड़ना। और इस्टेशन नहीं, station. I catch the train from the railway station. [Pick? Pick means to lift. Will you lift the train? Catch means to catch. And not istation, station. I catch the train from the railway station.] Speaker B: ओहो, मेरा प्रोनन्सिएशन वीक है। [Oh, my pronunciation is weak.] Speaker A: कोई बात नहीं। AI Teacher ट्राई किया क्या? [No problem. Did you try AI Teacher?] Speaker B: वो महंगा होगा ना? [That must be expensive, right?] Speaker A: बिल्कुल नहीं। नॉर्मल इंग्लिश क्लासेस से 7 गुना सस्ता है। इसलिए 50 लाख लोग MySivi पर प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing on MySivi.] Speaker B: लेकिन टाइम नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.] Speaker A: रोज़ सिर्फ 15 से 20 मिनट प्रैक्टिस काफी है। धीरे-धीरे कॉन्फिडेंट हो जाओगे। [Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice daily is enough. Gradually you will become confident.] Speaker B: वाओ! कैसे ज्वाइन करूं? [Wow! How do I join?] Speaker A: नीचे इंस्टॉल का बटन दबाओ, MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो, साइन अप करो और प्रैक्टिस शुरू करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में इंप्रूवमेंट दिखने लगेगा। ट्रायल सिर्फ ₹1 में 3 दिनों के लिए है। अभी शुरू करो। [Press the install button below, install the MySivi app, sign up, and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. The trial is just for ₹1 for 3 days. Start now.]
on_screen_text: कल कहां गए थे [Where did you go yesterday], I went to माल yesterday, pronunciation, It is Mall, I went to the mall, कल क्या खाया [What did you eat yesterday], I eat पीजा खाया [I eat pizza ate], Pizza, eat नहीं ate [not eat, ate], I ate pizza, train कहां से पकड़ते [where do you catch train], I pick train from railway इस्टेशन [railway station], Pick मतलब उठाना [Pick means to lift], Catch मतलब पकड़ना [Catch means to catch], station, the railway station, AI Teacher, Normal English classes से 7 गुना सस्ता [7 times cheaper than normal English classes], MySivi, 15 से 20 मिनट प्रैक्टिस [15 to 20 minutes practice], Trial सिर्फ ₹1 में 3 दिनों के लिए [Trial for just ₹1 for 3 days]
summary: A simulated voice call where a female speaker corrects a male speaker's English grammar and pronunciation errors. She introduces the MySivi app as an affordable AI-powered English learning tool that requires only 15-20 minutes of daily practice. The ad concludes with a call-to-action to install the app and try a 3-day trial for ₹1.
